title: ADDATTRIBUTE
text: ADDATTRIBUTE Adds an attribute to a start element tag. Explain this code ADDATTRIBUTE(Name, Value, Indent) Copy Parameters Table 1. ADDATTRIBUTE parameters Parameter Data Type Direction Description Name String IN Attribute name; maximum length is 40 bytes. Value String IN Attribute value; maximum length is 512 bytes. Indent Boolean IN Indicates whether the attribute should start on a new line with indentation spaces prefixed, or that it should be added to the previous attribute or element start tag separated only by a space. Return Values Values returned: 0 Success. –1 Failure. Called in an illegal sequence. Description This operation can occur only immediately after an invocation of STARTELEMENT , because attributes can be added only to the start tag of an element. Explain this code uxml2->startElement("", "ElementA", "") uxml2->addAttribute("attr1", "ValueA", 1) uxml2->addAttribute("attr2", "ValueB", "true") uxml2->addAttribute("attr3", "ValueC", "false") Copy Result: Explain this code <ElementA attr1=”ValueA” attr2=”ValueB” attr3=”ValueC” Copy Was this topic helpful?
